codeReview.summary: Added join(searchPath, '.devin/skills') to the prioritySearchDirs array in src/skills.ts at line 166, in correct alphabetical position between .continue/skills and .github/skills. The change is a single-line insertion replacing a blank line, following the established pattern exactly. Five tests in tests/devin-discovery.test.ts cover: single skill discovery, multiple skills, coexistence with other agents, deduplication when same skill exists in .devin/skills/ and .agents/skills/, and a source-code grep verifying the entry exists. Tests use temp directories with proper cleanup (afterEach rmSync). Tests are well-structured with clear setup/teardown patterns.

summary: Clean, minimal implementation. Single-line source change adds .devin/skills to discovery paths in correct alphabetical position. Five comprehensive tests verify all discovery scenarios including deduplication. Fulfills VAL-INT-001 completely.
